commit.message:
Misc improvements related to abbreviated cycles

Planning to integrate these as separate PRs, but combining everything
together for CI performance testing:

1. Only count abbreviated GC times during learning, and count them as
   half a normal GC cycle time.
2. Degen out of cycle should also impose triggering penalties
3. Only rebuild freeset once during abbreviated GC cycles

These are in addition to the original fix in this PR, which is to reset
the reserves at final mark when we decide this will be an abbreviated GC
cycle.
